title: Continuation pointer docs claim opened
body: Pearly Drifting Jetty opened claim 12e15e46 on agentic-engineering-enhancements to clarify start-right-team continuation-pointer behaviour, refresh the current next-session record, and add continuation template/guidance. Scope is docs/process only: .agent/skills/start-right-team/SKILL-CANONICAL.md, .agent/memory/operational/threads/agentic-engineering-enhancements.next-session.md, .agent/memory/operational/threads/README.md, and napkin.md. Pre-existing dirty plan files are unrelated and will be left alone.
